_note: Sample evidence fixture — not real sourced content. Used for local/demo mode only.

cards.title: Fed officials signal patience on rate cuts after strong payrolls
cards.summary: Multiple Fed officials reiterated a data-dependent stance following the April payrolls beat. No urgency to cut in the near term. Market-implied cuts pushed out.
cards.so_what: Front-end rates holding higher; USD/JPY supported. EM debt faces duration headwind.

cards.title: BOJ board member flags wage-inflation link as condition for further tightening
cards.summary: BOJ board member cited sustained wage growth as a prerequisite for additional rate hikes. Divergence with Fed policy path remains wide.
cards.so_what: Policy divergence narrative intact; supports USD/JPY long.

cards.title: Gold consolidating near highs as real-yield support holds
cards.summary: Research note argues gold's floor is supported by sticky real yields and persistent central bank demand. Near-term catalyst needed for breakout above 2350.
cards.so_what: Overweight gold position supported; watch real-yield move today for directional signal.
